nodes.title: Revoke other sessions
nodes.statement: When an account owner requests revocation of all other sessions, the authentication service MUST invalidate every session belonging to the account except the session authorizing the operation.

nodes.title: Other sessions are revoked
nodes.statement: Given an account owner has multiple active sessions, when they revoke all other sessions, then every other session is invalidated and the current session remains active.

nodes.title: Revoke-other-sessions command
nodes.statement: POST /sessions/revoke-others with the authorizing session token; returns the count of revoked sessions.

nodes.title: Revoke via central session store
nodes.statement: Implement revocation by deleting all session records for the account except the authorizing session id in the central store, inside a single transaction.

nodes.title: Expose a dedicated command endpoint
nodes.statement: Add a dedicated revoke-others endpoint rather than overloading the logout endpoint, so the authorizing session is unambiguous.
